title: narcissus tazetta subsp. intermedius
intro: Narcissus tazetta subsp. intermedius, also known as the intermediate tazetta narcissus, is a bulbous perennial plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its alkaloids, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Narcissus tazetta subsp. intermedius include its antimicrobial, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant's bulbs can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
